title: spiraea × fontenaysii
intro: Spiraea × fontenaysii, also known as Fontanes spirea, is a hybrid plant species in the family Rosaceae, resulting from the cross between Spiraea betulifolia and Spiraea media. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Spiraea × fontenaysii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Spiraea × fontenaysii can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
